bluntForce: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} with a @Wiki[Category:Knockout effects]{knockout effect}.
charging: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature you moved at least 5 feet towards this @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
gladiator: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a @Identifier[condition:prone]{prone}, @Identifier[condition:snared]{snared}, @Identifier[condition:frightened]{frightened}, @Identifier[condition:hacked]{hacked}, or @Identifier[condition:goaded]{goaded} creature.
greatKenjutsu: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature smaller than you on another creature's @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
greatSwordsman: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature smaller than you for the first time on your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
javelinier: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} with a @Identifier[property:thrown]{thrown} @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attack}.
juttejutsu: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature you've @Wiki[Category:Block abilities]{blocked} since the end of your last @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
kenjutsu: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} on another creature's @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
knife: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} on your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn} while @Identifier[condition:hidden]{hidden}.
kunai: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} if this was sheathed at the start of your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
phalanx: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature if you have an ally using a @UUID[Compendium.teriock.tables.RollTable.f596232e51f64ef9]{shield} directly between you and your target.
quickshot: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} on your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn} if you had three actions remaining prior to making this @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attack}.
savage: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a @Identifier[condition:prone]{prone}, @Identifier[condition:snared]{snared}, @Identifier[condition:frightened]{frightened}, @Identifier[condition:suffocating]{suffocating}, or @Identifier[condition:immobilized]{immobilized} creature.
sniper: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} on your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn} if you have not @Identifier[ability:move]{moved} since the end of your last @Identifier[core:turns]{turn} and will have no actions remaining after this @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attack}.
swordsman: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} for the first time on your @Identifier[core:turns]{turn}.
trident: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} from or into the water.
wraparound: Weapons with this @Wiki[Category:Weapon fighting styles]{fighting style} gain @Identifier[core:style-bonus]{SB} when you're @Identifier[core:attack-interaction]{attacking} a creature with a @UUID[Compendium.teriock.tables.RollTable.f596232e51f64ef9]{shield}.
